message:
fix(web): add circuit breaker to FetchConvoys and cache expanded views (gt-8ki)

FetchConvoys enters a failure loop when bd list --type=convoy fails
persistently (e.g., schema mismatch), spawning concurrent dolt remote -v
processes that sustain 50%+ CPU. Two fixes:

1. Circuit breaker on LiveConvoyFetcher.FetchConvoys: tracks consecutive
   failures and applies exponential backoff (10s → 20s → ... → 5min cap),
   preventing repeated bd process spawning on persistent errors.

2. Expanded-view cache: ?expand= requests previously bypassed the response
   cache entirely, allowing process storms via rapid refresh. Now cached
   with the same TTL as normal views.

Closes GH#3117.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
